title: PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: SAINT HELENS COLUMBIA FAMILY RESOURCES PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based organization that provides information and referrals to those who are experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include free pregnancy testing, pro-life counseling, parenting support, maternity clothing and infant clothing and community referrals. Does not recommend or refer to abortion services. You do not have to participate in classes to be eligible to receive maternity and infant clothes, diapers, and other infant care needs. Clients who participate in the classes are eligible to receive maternity and infant clothes, diapers, and other infant care needs. 970 Columbia Boulevard Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Thursday 1pm-5pm, Wednesday 10am-2pm Email (503) 397-6047 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 397-6047 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None; donations accepted DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, printed information in Spanish AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Baby Clothing Maternity Clothing Pregnancy Testing Pro-Life Pregnancy Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAINT HELENS COLUMBIA FAMILY RESOURCES
